name: commit-commands
description: Codex-native commit workflows with current-model and reasoning-effort attribution.

interface.shortDescription: Commit workflows with dynamic model and effort attribution.
interface.longDescription: A native Codex skill adaptation of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin. It preserves the original commit, commit-push-pr, and forceful clean_gone workflows while using a Codex hook to add current-model and reasoning-effort attribution to new commits.
defaultPrompt: Create one commit for my current changes.
Commit my changes, push the branch, and open a pull request.
Force-clean local branches whose upstream is gone.
